---
title: "Getting started with deckglgeoarrow"
format: html
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting started with deckglgeoarrow}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

The simplest use-case is 

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(mapgl)
library(deckglgeoarrow)
library(wk)

style_positron = "https://basemaps.cartocdn.com/gl/positron-gl-style/style.json"

pt = wkt("POINT (0 0)")

maplibre(style = style_positron) |>
  addGeoArrowScatterplotLayer(
    data = pt
  )
```
